summary: Conservative refactoring review of Issue #743 (PC per-split header status indicator restoration, #728 follow-up / #740-pattern). No change is warranted across all four review observations. (1) TerminalSplitPaneContent.tsx statusIndicator useMemo (L185-201): deps [statusConfig.type, statusConfig.className, statusConfig.label, splitIndex] correctly track every referenced primitive; statusConfig is a cheap SIDEBAR_STATUS_CONFIG lookup; memo-safe and readable. The spinner/non-spinner two-branch span duplication is intentional pattern-mirroring of the Mobile canonical span (WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1971-1981); deduplicating would either diverge PC from the canonical markup or require touching the off-limits Mobile path, so it is correctly left as-is per the conservative directive. (2) renderSplitPane (WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1484, 1510, 1526): derives paneCliStatus as a plain BranchStatus string via deriveCliStatus; only the resolved string crosses the React.memo boundary and worktree?.sessionStatusByCli is in the useCallback deps -> S3-001 memo-safe preserved. (3) No duplicate/unused code: both new imports (SIDEBAR_STATUS_CONFIG, BranchStatus) are used; naming (paneCliStatus / cliStatus / statusConfig / statusIndicator) is consistent with the #740 paneAutoYes* siblings and the Mobile path; no 'processing' literal; BranchStatus is a closed 5-value union. (4) JSDoc / maintenance comments are proportionate and accurate (correct Issue refs #728/#740/#743, S3-001/S3-006 rationale, correct canonical-span line references) — neither excessive nor missing. The change is a textbook additive (+11 source lines) reuse of the established #740 propagate pattern; acceptance already PASS with all gates GREEN. Quality gates marked n/a because no files were modified; existing GREEN state from acceptance is retained.
